retry_reason: Put operations are intended to be called exactly once; retrying would cause double-release and potential use-after-free.
contract_summary: This function releases the reference-counted resources associated with a dev_pm_opp: it puts the device node (opp->np) and frees the required OPPs (via _of_opp_free_required_opps). It is a cleanup wrapper called when clearing an OPP's device tree data. After calling this function, the caller must not access the released resources (opp->np and the required OPPs). The function does not release the opp structure itself, only its sub-resources.
